zh.St Botolph without Bishopsgate, City of: 英國米德萊可倫敦 比曉普斯蓋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London於1419年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Sir William Marrow III39歲，母親Johanna Chedworth18歲。他於1445年與Margaret Rich在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1464年1月11日在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 比曉普斯蓋特。

zh-hans.St Botolph without Bishopsgate, City of: 英国米德萊可倫敦 比曉普斯蓋特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London于1419年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Sir William Marrow III39岁，母亲Johanna Chedworth18岁。他于1445年与Margaret Rich在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1464年1月11日在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 比曉普斯蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Marrow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English marwe, marowe ‘companion, mate’.

variants.name: Marra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Carmine, Salvatore, Enrico, Pasquale, Sal, Vincenzo, Alessandro, Gaetano, Marino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of the places so called in central and southern Italy, from marra ‘heap of stones’.

Italian, Galician, and Portuguese: from marra ‘hoe’, in Galician and Portuguese also ‘big mallet for breaking stones’ (from Latin marra), presumably a metonymic occupational name for one who made such implements or for one who used them.

variants.name: Merrow
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marrow  .
English: habitational name from Merrow in Surrey, apparently derived from Old English mearg ‘marrow, fat’, used figuratively to mean ‘fertile ground’.
Americanized form of French   Amirault   or of any of its altered forms. Compare   Meraw   and   Mero   4.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London was born in 1419, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Sir William Marrow III, was 39 and his mother, Johanna Chedworth, was 18. He married Margaret Rich in 1445, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 11 January 1464, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London est né en 1419, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Marrow III, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Johanna Chedworth, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Rich en 1445, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1464, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London 1419 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Marrow III 39 und seine Mutter Johanna Chedworth 18. Er hat 1445 in London, Middlesex, England Margaret Rich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Januar 1464 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London è nato il nel 1419 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Sir William Marrow III, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Chedworth, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Rich nel 1445, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 11 gennaio 1464, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, England.

ja.London,,Middlesex,England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of Londonが1419年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir William Marrow IIIは39歳，母Johanna Chedworthは18歳であった。1445年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでMargaret Richと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1464年1月11日に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン ビショプスガトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London(이)가 1419년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Marrow III(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Chedworth(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Margaret Rich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년 1월 11일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 비숍스가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London nasceu em 1419, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Marrow III, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Chedworth, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Rich em 1445, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1464, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London родился в 1419 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Marrow III было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Chedworth, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Rich в 1445 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 11 января 1464 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности лондон бишопсгэит, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London nació en 1419, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Marrow III, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Johanna Chedworth, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Rich en 1445, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 11 de enero de 1464, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en London Bishopsgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
